patch.value: Auto-migrate previous-version trackers on first mutation
Current build blocks mutation of 2026.3.12 tracker data until item_format is manually selected, which breaks automatic migration expectations for existing collected data.

A tracker created by @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.3.12 can be read and mutated by the current build without manual item-format setup; first mutation auto-selects/migrates to the current default format without losing items, linked artifacts, comments, history, or close metadata.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Compatibility sandbox using isolated npm install of @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.3.12 created three legacy items and then current dist/cli.js update failed with exit 4: Write command update requires explicit item format selection before mutations. Duplicate check: pm search 'item format selection before mutations previous version auto migrate' found only closed prior migration feature/task work; pm list-open --type Issue showed no active compatibility issue.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Fix must preserve explicit item_format behavior when a project has selected a format,while allowing pre-item_format projects from published versions to auto-upgrade on first current mutation.

value.note: regression for legacy item_format auto-selection and migration
auto-select legacy item_format before pre-mutation sync

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts -t 'auto-selects default item_format|auto-migrates item files before mutation'

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Implemented compatibility fix: legacy settings without item_format now persist the default item_format and run pre-mutation item-file sync instead of blocking. Evidence: targeted sandboxed integration test passed; previous-version sandbox created 3 items with @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.3.12 and current dist/cli.js migrated 3 .md items to 3 .toon items with item count, linked artifacts, close reason, health, and history drift checks preserved.

patch.value: Legacy settings without item_format now auto-select the default format and run pre-mutation item-file migration.
Trackers created by @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.3.12 can be read and mutated by the current build without manual item-format setup or data loss.
Previous-version sandbox migrated 3 markdown items to TOON on first current mutation while preserving item count, linked artifacts, comments, close metadata, health, and history integrity.

author: codex-release-agent

patch.value: Legacy previous-version tracker mutation now auto-migrates and all linked regression/compatibility checks passed.

message: Close compatibility issue with migration evidence
